uplink.description: Multi-sensor uplink: sensor status, battery, temperature, and a live GPS fix (TTN example 2 input)
GPS fix with a southern-hemisphere / eastern coordinate (negative latitude exercises int32 two's-complement) plus battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (latitude/longitude = int32 / 1e6, battery uint8 / 10).

uplink.description: Truncated TLV block: declared length runs past the end of the payload
uplink._note: Synthetic malformed frame: a 5001 (GPS latitude) block declaring 6 bytes but carrying only 1 value byte.
